package rulecoverage

func PositiveRawDbErrorExposedToClient() string {
    ruleID := "raw_db_error_exposed_to_client"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Direct serialization of SQL or GORM error text into API responses."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
